nasb.text: “When a man takes a wife and marries her, and it happens that she finds no favor in his eyes because he has found some indecency in her, and he writes her a certificate of divorce and puts it in her hand and sends her out from his house,

esv.text: “When a man takes a wife and marries her, if then she finds no favor in his eyes because he has found some indecency in her, and he writes her a certificate of divorce and puts it in her hand and sends her out of his house, and she departs out of his house,

cnv.text: “人娶了妻子，得著她以後，如果發現她有醜事，以致不喜悅她，他就可以給她寫休書，交在她手裡，叫她離開夫家；

ccb.text: “如果有人娶妻后，发觉妻子行为不检，因而嫌弃她，他可以写休书给她，让她离开夫家。
